Who We Are

BUILT FOR WARRIORS.

Hardcore Guts Gym has been Vijayawada's premier destination for serious fitness since 2018. Located at Ajit Singh Nagar, PNT Colony, we offer a fully equipped training floor with expert coaches who push you beyond your limits.

Whether you're here to build muscle, lose weight, or compete — our environment breeds champions. Men and women both welcome. No judgment, only progress.

▸
State-of-the-art equipment — free weights, machines, cardio floor
▸
Personal trainers with certified expertise in strength & conditioning
▸
Open 5:00 AM – 10:00 PM, 7 days a week
▸
Separate workout sections for men & women
▸
Wheelchair accessible entrance — fitness for everyone
